title: PangTeen's Immortal Adventure
body:
### Introduction

Welcome to Immortal mod made by PangTeen and GrassCarp. This mod aims to create a new adventure based on the spiritual cultivation system. The mod allows players to make elixirs, learn spells and so on.

### Features
Cultivate : Players can cultivate themselves to grow stronger.  
Elixir : Try various ingredients to find out new elixirs.  
Spell : There are different spells for players to learn.  
Element : Six basic elements can interact with each other through element reaction.  
Golem : You can make your custom AI golem in game.  

 

### Pre-requisites

This mod requires HTLib as dependency.


### Beta Test
[Youtube Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mBm1bjxTniE)
